$comment: v2.1 Phase 1.5 (D12.7) runtime budgets. Measured via window.CueolaPerf.report() — boot the app, loadDemo → goLive, three enter/leave-live cycles, then report(). Baseline machine: dev MacBook (Chrome, localhost preview) 2026-07-20. Re-measure on show-class hardware before Phase 12 and tighten; the Phase 12 regression matrix fails a release that exceeds maxima.

maxima.$comment: Hard ceilings for the Phase 12 gate — generous vs. baseline to absorb show-class hardware, but any breach means an owned regression hunt.

intervalOwners.$comment: Every interval has an owner and a stop path (D12.7). The census after 3 live cycles must show ONLY owned timers — a growing count is a leak.
expected: live link-state ticker (ensureLiveLinkTicker, 1s — self-stops when no surface is active)
prompter operator bridge ping (_ensurePrompterOperatorBridge, 5s — cleared by stopPrompterOperatorRuntime)
live wall clock (startWallClock, 1s — cleared by stopWallClock)
